title: Save File As...
code:
import os
import sys

def load_directory(path):
    try:
        os.chdir(path)
        cwd = os.getcwd()
        dirs = ['..']
        files = []
        for f in os.listdir(cwd):
            if os.path.isdir(f):
                dirs.append(f)
            else:
                files.append(f)
        dirs.sort()
        files.sort()
        lst_dirs.items = dirs
        lst_dirs.list_index = 0
        lst_dirs.scroll_offset = 0
        lst_files.items = files
        lst_files.list_index = 0
        lst_files.scroll_offset = 0
        txt_filename.caption = ''
    except Exception as e:
        msgbox(f'Error:\n{e}')

def on_form_load():
    if sys.platform == 'win32':
        drives = [f'{chr(d)}:\\' for d in range(65, 91) if os.path.exists(f'{chr(d)}:')]
        if not drives: drives = ['C:\\']
        cmb_drives.items = drives
        cwd_drive = os.path.splitdrive(os.getcwd())[0] + '\\'
        if cwd_drive in drives:
            cmb_drives.list_index = drives.index(cwd_drive)
    else:
        cmb_drives.x = -100
        cmb_drives.y = -100
    load_directory(os.getcwd())
